nasb.text: Many also of those who had believed kept coming, confessing and disclosing their practices.

esv.text: Also many of those who were now believers came, confessing and divulging their practices.

cnv.text: 也有許多信了的人，來承認和述說自己行過的事。

ccb.text: 许多已经信耶稣的人都前来认罪，公开承认自己的恶行。

csbs.text: 而且许多信徒都来，承认并述说自己的所作所为。
